# Plank & Brush Website

This is a professional business website for Plank & Brush, a painting and flooring company. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

## Project Structure

- **Home Page**: Hero section, services overview, and contact information
- **Services**: Detailed pages for painting and flooring services
- **About**: Company story, values, and team information
- **Portfolio**: Project gallery with filtering and before/after showcases
- **Contact**: Contact form, business information, and FAQ

## Features

- Responsive design optimized for all devices
- Professional business branding with blue color scheme
- Interactive contact form with validation
- Portfolio filtering system
- Mobile-friendly navigation
- SEO-optimized pages

## Technologies

- Next.js 15 with App Router
- TypeScript for type safety
- Tailwind CSS for styling
- Lucide React for icons
- Responsive design principles

## Development

- Run `npm run dev` to start development server
- All pages are pre-built with professional content
- Customizable color scheme and branding
- Ready for deployment
